sentences.translation: Dala je farmaceutkinji recept od ljekara.
sentences.translationEn: She gave the pharmacist a prescription from the doctor.

sentences.translation: Farmaceutkinja je objasnila kako uzimati lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explained how to take the medicine.

sentences.translation: Lejla je platila i zahvalila farmaceutkinji.
sentences.translationEn: Layla paid and thanked the pharmacist.

sentences.translation: Vratila se kući i uzela lijek.
sentences.translationEn: She returned home and took the medicine.
